nasb.text: But they were silent and answered him not a word; for the king’s commandment was, “Do not answer him.”

esv.text: But they were silent and answered him not a word, for the king’s command was, “Do not answer him.”

cnv.text: 眾人都默不作聲，一句話也沒有回答他，因為王的吩咐說：“不要回答他。”

ccb.text: 民众默不作声，一言不发，因为希西迦曾吩咐他们不要答话。

csbs.text: 众人都默不作声，一句也不回应，因为希西加王有令说：“不许回应他。”
